microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **fault isolation and recovery validation** program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing diagnostic workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive hardware-defect detection capability via rack-level drill programs, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months and establishing a new continuous-validation methodology for cross-functional engineering teams.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract across hardware, software, and test engineering teams.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to **cut planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly expanding adoption of next-generation validation techniques across stakeholder teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 key Azure service teams, conducting user demos and hands-on training that saved 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerated time-to-value for a novel diagnostic toolchain.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to prioritization of intent-based YAML generation for the next development cycle.

Improved data integrity and **fault-tracing accuracy** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing lookup time by 83% across internal engineering workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams spanning hardware, software, and operations.

Drove product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per launch** and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI diagnostic dashboard** to track and visualize operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact programs with measurable business outcomes.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping hardware and software dependencies across 1,200+ stations to ensure compatibility with production test flows.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain on-schedule delivery across cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across the test and release workflow.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM process that standardized customer engagement and reduced proposal cycle time.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to align messaging with target market needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that tightened cost controls across service lines.
